title: Nutit a.s.
author: NutitCZ
selftext:
**Call for concepts, idea and model in the field of systematic trading and data modeling.**

Can we use the analytics of different datasets to predict financial instruments price performance? Ubiquity of data today enables investors of any scale to make better investment decisions, but still the challenge is crunching and interpreting the data to determine which data is useful and how it can be used to trade for profit. Profitable trading always been a difficult problem to solve, even more so in today’s fast-moving and complex financial markets. Electronic trading allows for thousands of transactions to occur within a fraction of a second, resulting in nearly unlimited opportunities to potentially find and to take advantage of price differences in real time. On top of that, economic opportunity depends on the ability to deliver accurate predictions in a world of uncertainty. By accurately forecasting financial movements, using scientifically driven approaches one can unlock significant predictive capability thus investment value.

We challenge you to take on the very difficult task of predicting the future of financial instruments movements or defining market inefficiencies or other opportunities that can be used for profitable trading.

We are ready to support, fund and/or jump-start any ideas, concepts or models in the field of investing, systematic trading or data modeling that has a potential to generate value.

Contact us and Nutit’s Algo Trading team will discreetly review, analyze, and evaluate your concept. If it has a promising potential, Nutit a.s. will be honored to jumpstart the implementation process, help you fine tune and improve your own investment system and finally turn it into profitable Algo-Trading venture, giving you a unique opportunity to see your idea operate in real market conditions and generate profits for you.

If you think you are the concept we seek, don’t hesitate to contact us at [info@nutit.cz](mailto:info@nutit.cz)

For more info check out our page: [https://nutit.cz/#Algo](https://nutit.cz/#Algo)
